'''Darada''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the edge of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. [[Jev Sunrider]] was a [[Jedi Watchman/Legends|Jedi Watchman]] of Darada. His grandson, [[Andur Sunrider]], spent the first nineteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of his life there.

During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] the [[Exchange]] delivered black market weapons to their allies on Darada.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Underworld Trading|Exchanging Supplies}}</ref>
